name: 02 — Uptime Watcher (S1 alerts)
description: Receives uptime monitor webhook (Better Stack or alt). On site down: pages PBS via email, triggers Vercel rollback if recent deploy.

modules_overview.config_notes: Better Stack: Heartbeat → Webhook integration. URL goes in Better Stack.

modules_overview.purpose: Vercel API: check most recent deployment
Branch on recent deploy or not
modules_overview.config_notes: Route A: deploy <30min ago → trigger rollback. Route B: no recent deploy → just alert.
Subject: 🚨 SITE DOWN — {{site}}. Body: time detected, what auto-action taken, current status, link to runbook.
GET https://{{site}}/api/health (or homepage). If up → close incident. If still down → escalate.
If up: set resolved_at=NOW(), mttr_minutes=delta. If down: send escalation email.

manual_setup_steps: 1. Sign up Better Stack free tier
2. Add monitor for the namkhan-bi production URL (namkhan-bi.vercel.app — replace with custom domain when assigned)
3. Configure monitor: HTTPS, every 1 min, 2 retries before alert
4. Create Make.com scenario, add Custom Webhook
5. In Better Stack monitor → Integrations → add Webhook with Make.com URL
6. Test: pause one monitor → trigger alert → verify Make.com fires
guardrails: Only 1 escalation email per incident (not flood)
Auto-close incident if site recovers within 5 min
Skip rollback if no previous deployment exists
Skip rollback if previous was also failed
